mapper.select: SELECT user_id, common_ticket_type, common_category, common_priority, common_terms, response_style, source, confidence, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_user_preference_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_user_preference_memory ( user_id, common_ticket_type, common_category, common_priority, common_terms, response_style, source, confidence, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{commonTicketType}, #{commonCategory}, #{commonPriority}, #{commonTerms}, #{responseStyle}, #{source}, #{confidence}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE common_ticket_type = VALUES(common_ticket_type), common_category = VALUES(common_category), common_priority = VALUES(common_priority), common_terms = VALUES(common_terms), response_style = VALUES(response_style), source = VALUES(source), confidence = VALUES(confidence), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), updated_at = NOW()
